ops.text: 16-agent evidence pass over the daemonkit extraction plan (workflow wf_ef53c8eb-701): 9 repo-lesson miners (fusekit, cc-interact, cc-orchestrate, cc-pool, synckit, captain-hook, authkit/cc-sudo, homebrew-tap, repo-bootstrap), 4 web-research lanes (launchd/SMAppService, notarization, XPC/codesign trust, UDS peer auth), 1 donor-code improvement scan, 2 codex gpt-5.6-sol xhigh scrutiny passes. Yield: 127 repo lessons, 50 web findings, 15 improvement opportunities, 85 finder amendments, 17 adversarial scenarios. All must-fix findings folded into the plan as normative contracts (drain Transition ordering + canonical truncation, tri-state liveness, feature-bit capability negotiation, DR-pinned fail-closed trust, SMAppService greenfield default, full cert chain in p12, P0b/P2b/pinned-tap-release sequencing). Attached: full workflow JSON output (repo_lessons/web_findings/improvements/critique/refutation), the 85-finding critique, the lesson-impact digest.
